name: conbot5
description: CONbot5 — Supreme Music Intelligence Platform. Surpasses Rythm.

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd services/api && npm run dev" "cd services/ws && npm run dev" "cd apps/bot && npm run dev" "cd apps/web && npm run dev"
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd services/api && npm install && cd ../../services/ws && npm install && cd ../../apps/bot && npm install && cd ../web && npm install
